name: Lemon Lime Marmalade
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Thinly Sliced Lemons, unpeeled, seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lime and lemon slices with water in a large pot.
2. Bring to a boil and continue boiling for 20 minutes, or until the peel is tender.
3. Drain and measure the liquid. Add enough water to make 3 quarts of liquid total.
4. Combine the liquid, fruit, and sugar in the pot.
5. Bring to a boil and cook rapidly until the mixture sheets off a spoon easily, or until it reaches 221 degrees on a candy thermometer.
6. Pour hot marmalade into sterilized jars and seal.
Makes 6 to 8 half-pints.
